mapper.sql: select b.batch_id, b.task_id, b.batch_name, b.source_type, b.source_name, b.source_record_id, b.dept_id, b.responsible_unit_id, b.responsible_unit_name, b.region_code, b.region_name, b.period_type, b.period_year, b.period_quarter, b.period_month, b.period_key, b.batch_status, b.submit_by, b.submit_time, b.audit_by, b.audit_time, b.audit_opinion, b.item_count, b.create_by, b.create_time, b.update_by, b.update_time, b.remark from nc_fusion_collection_batch b
mapper.select: select item_id, batch_id, dept_id, responsible_unit_id, responsible_unit_name, region_code, region_name, period_key, indicator_id, indicator_name, indicator_code, raw_value, value_decimal, value_text, value_date, validation_status, validation_message, is_current, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from nc_fusion_collection_item where batch_id = #{batchId} and del_flag = '0' order by item_id

select log_id, batch_id, from_status, to_status, action_name, audit_by, audit_time, audit_opinion, create_by, create_time, remark from nc_fusion_collection_audit_log where batch_id = #{batchId} order by audit_time, log_id
mapper.insert: insert into nc_fusion_collection_batch (task_id, batch_name, source_type, source_name, source_record_id, dept_id, responsible_unit_id, responsible_unit_name, region_code, region_name, period_type, period_year, period_quarter, period_month, period_key, batch_status, submit_by, submit_time, item_count, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{taskId}, #{batchName}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceName}, #{sourceRecordId}, #{deptId}, #{responsibleUnitId}, #{responsibleUnitName}, #{regionCode}, #{regionName}, #{periodType}, #{periodYear}, #{periodQuarter}, #{periodMonth}, #{periodKey}, #{batchStatus}, #{submitBy}, #{submitTime}, #{itemCount}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})

insert into nc_fusion_collection_item (batch_id, dept_id, responsible_unit_id, responsible_unit_name, region_code, region_name, period_key, indicator_id, indicator_name, indicator_code, raw_value, value_decimal, value_text, value_date, validation_status, validation_message, is_current, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{batchId}, #{deptId}, #{responsibleUnitId}, #{responsibleUnitName}, #{regionCode}, #{regionName}, #{periodKey}, #{indicatorId}, #{indicatorName}, #{indicatorCode}, #{rawValue}, #{valueDecimal}, #{valueText}, #{valueDate}, #{validationStatus}, #{validationMessage}, #{isCurrent}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})

insert into nc_fusion_collection_audit_log (batch_id, from_status, to_status, action_name, audit_by, audit_time, audit_opinion, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{batchId}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{actionName}, #{auditBy}, #{auditTime}, #{auditOpinion}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})

insert into nc_fusion_collection_import_failure (dept_id, import_batch_name, source_record_id, row_num, field_name, raw_value, failure_reason, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{deptId}, #{importBatchName}, #{sourceRecordId}, #{rowNum}, #{fieldName}, #{rawValue}, #{failureReason}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
mapper.select: select b.batch_status as stat_name, count(1) as count_value from nc_fusion_collection_batch b where b.del_flag = '0' ${params.dataScope} group by b.batch_status order by b.batch_status
